PROJECT OVERVIEW: NORTHGATE COMMERCIAL COMPLEX

The Northgate Commercial Complex is a mixed-use development located in the city center.
This document outlines the environmental position of the project.

ENERGY SYSTEMS:
The project does not use solar panels. There are no renewable energy installations planned
or operational on this site. The building will not integrate wind turbines or any form of
renewable electricity generation. Conventional grid electricity is the sole power source.

The facility has not achieved LEED certification and does not hold any green building
certification. There is no EDGE certification or equivalent.

CARBON EMISSIONS:
GHG reduction targets have not been set for this project. No CO2 reduction measures are
in place. The project does not follow any emission reduction framework.

WASTE MANAGEMENT:
No recycling infrastructure is provided. Waste sorting has not been implemented.
The project does not adhere to any waste reduction plan.

WATER:
No water recycling or rainwater harvesting system is installed. There is no water
efficiency program for this building.

CONCLUSION:
This project does not meet green finance criteria. The environmental profile is
conventional, with no renewable energy, no certification, and no emission commitments.
